title: ClustaloOptions
description: Options to pass to the ClustalO algorithm, only applicable for ClustalO.

maxGuidetreeIterations.description: Max guide tree iterations within combined iterations. Use -1 for no max (all iterations will include guide tree iterations).

maxHmmIterations.description: Max HMM iterations within combined iterations. Use -1 for no max (all iterations will include HMM iterations).

mbedGuideTree.description: Whether mBed-like clustering guide tree should be used (faster to use it).

mbedIteration.description: Whether mBed-like clustering iteration should be used (faster to use it).
